subcodes.first_line: O Lord! Cause Thy cherished handmaiden, Shirin Namir, to enter the sublime Paradise and grant her dwelling in the exalted realm [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای پروردگار کنیز عزیزت شیرین نمیر را به بهشت برین درآر و در فضای علیین منزل و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @eulogies; reminiscences, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation, @living waters; water of life
